maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday August 19, 2020 at 05:26

PUBLIC "-//Yale University::Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library//TEXT (US::CtYBR::::[JOHN WHITE GEARY BUSINESS PAPERS ])//EN" "gearybus.xml" converted from EAD 1.0 to 2002 by v1to02.xsl (sy2003-10-15).

did.unittitle: John White Geary business papers

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

did.abstract: The papers consist of business and other correspondence, notes, accounts, and other documents.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The John White Geary Business Papers are the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: John White Geary Business Papers. Yale Collection of Western Americana, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

relatedmaterial.head: Associated Materials
relatedmaterial.p: Other Geary collections at the Beinecke are the John White Geary Papers (WA MSS 212), the John White Geary Mexican War Papers (WA MSS S-585), and a letter from Geary to Major General Persifor Smith (WA MSS S-218).

bioghist.head: JOHN WHITE GEARY (1819-1873)
bioghist.p: John White Geary (1819-1873) served in the Mexican War in the 2d Pennsylvania Infantry, became postmaster at San Francisco in 1849, and held several other public posts in San Francisco. He returned to Pennsylvania in 1852, became governor of Kansas Territory in 1856, but resigned in 1857 and went back to Pennsylvania. Geary served with the 28th Pennsylvania Regiment in the Civil War and was twice elected governor of the state, 1867-1873.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The papers consist of business and other correspondence, notes, accounts, and other documents. All letters are to Geary, unless otherwise specified. Additional unsorted papers, including: autograph documents, bonds, photos of Geary, autograph notes, etc., are included in folder marked, "Miscellaneous Material," but have not been listed.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: This collection, listed alphabetically here, is arranged chronologically.
